How It Works

From global shelf to your door

VerteMarket removes every barrier between Congolese consumers and the world's retail catalogues — catalogue access, payments, and cross-border logistics.

STEP 01
🔍

Browse

Explore curated products from leading global platforms, all in one place with prices shown in USD or Congolese Franc.

STEP 02
💳

Pay Locally

Check out using M-Pesa, Orange Money, Airtel Money, bank transfer or card — the methods you already use.

STEP 03
🚚

We Handle It

We procure your items, consolidate them at our hub, and manage freight, insurance and customs clearance.

STEP 04
🏠

Receive

Your order is delivered to you in Kinshasa, with full tracking from checkout to your doorstep.

Sourcing Partners

Three catalogues, one platform

We bring together the platforms that matter — for everyday essentials, fashion and bulk wholesale.

Amazon

Millions of products sourced from local South African inventory for fast fulfilment.

Via JHB Hub → Kinshasa

Shein

Fashion, beauty and lifestyle products at accessible prices for every style.

Via Guangzhou Hub → Kinshasa

Alibaba

Wholesale and bulk sourcing for businesses, retailers and resellers across the DRC.

Via Guangzhou Hub → Kinshasa
Shop the Catalogue

Browse and order

Prices are all-in landed costs to Kinshasa. Browse, add to cart, and check out with full cost transparency.

About Us

Built by Verte Investments

VerteMarket is a cross-border e-commerce and logistics platform owned and operated by Verte Investments (Pty) Ltd, a South African company.

We exist to solve a real problem: consumers in the Democratic Republic of Congo have limited access to global retail catalogues, no easy way to pay international merchants, and unreliable cross-border delivery.

VerteMarket bridges all three gaps — combining catalogue access, local mobile-money payments, and an established South-Africa-to-DRC logistics corridor backed by a licensed importer and proven freight forwarding partners.

Our mission is simple: connect the continent to the world's marketplaces, reliably and transparently.

Why VerteMarket

✓  One platform for multiple global catalogues

✓  Pay in Congolese Franc or USD via mobile money

✓  Transparent all-in landed pricing — no surprises

✓  Licensed import & established freight corridor

✓  Full order tracking to your door in Kinshasa

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

Verte Investments (Pty) Ltd ("we", "us", "VerteMarket") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use and safeguard information when you use our platform.

1. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly, including your name, contact details, delivery address, and order details. We collect payment confirmation data through our payment partners but do not store full payment credentials.

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To process and fulfil your orders as your procurement agent
  • To arrange shipping, customs clearance and delivery
  • To communicate order updates and respond to enquiries
  • To improve our platform and services

3. Product Catalogue Data

Product information displayed on our platform is sourced from our retail partners through authorised channels and is used solely to enable you to browse and select products. We do not collect or store personal data belonging to those partners' other customers.

4. Sharing of Information

We share information only as necessary to fulfil your order — with freight forwarders, customs brokers and delivery partners. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

5. Data Security

We use encryption in transit and at rest, restrict access to authorised personnel, and follow industry-standard security practices to protect your information.

6. Data Retention

We retain personal data only as long as necessary to fulfil orders, meet legal obligations, and resolve disputes. Cached catalogue data is refreshed regularly and not retained long-term.

7. Your Rights

You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at the email address below.

8. Contact

For privacy questions, contact us at privacy@vertemarket.com.

← Back to home

Terms of Service

Last updated: June 2026

These Terms of Service govern your use of the VerteMarket platform, operated by Verte Investments (Pty) Ltd. By using our platform you agree to these terms.

1. Our Role — Independent Purchasing Agent

VerteMarket acts as an independent purchasing agent and logistics facilitator. When you place an order, you authorise us to procure the specified products on your behalf from third-party retail platforms, and to arrange their export, customs clearance and delivery to you in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

2. Pricing

Prices displayed are all-in landed costs and include the product price plus shipment costs (freight, insurance, duties, import taxes, customs clearing and handling) and our service fee. Prices are shown in USD with a Congolese Franc equivalent and may change based on source availability and exchange rates at the time of order.

3. Orders & Payment

Payment is collected at the time of order. We accept mobile money, bank transfer and other listed methods. Your order is confirmed once payment clears.

4. Delivery

Estimated delivery times are provided in good faith but are not guaranteed, as cross-border logistics and customs processing can vary. We will keep you informed of your order status throughout.

5. Returns & Disputes

As your purchasing agent, returns are subject to the policies of the source platform and the practicalities of cross-border logistics. We will assist with eligible returns, damaged goods and disputes on a case-by-case basis. Specific terms are provided at checkout.

6. Limitation of Liability

We act diligently as your agent but are not liable for delays, losses or damages outside our reasonable control, including customs actions, carrier delays or source-platform stock changes.

7. Prohibited Items

We do not procure goods that are illegal to import into the DRC, restricted by source platforms for resale, or otherwise prohibited by law.

8. Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of South Africa, where Verte Investments (Pty) Ltd is registered.

9. Contact

For questions about these terms, contact legal@vertemarket.com.

Checkout
